[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00111001 4
1 11101000 4
2 11010101 5
3 11110011 6
4 11010000 3
5 10011111 6
6 11111011 7
7 10111111 7

12 21 11011110 6
23 32 10011111 6 match 5

45 54 11111111 a
56 65 10111111 7 match 7
67 76 01101110 5
70 07 01101110 5

57 75 11111111 a

71 17 01111110 6
